description:
A Dashboard that monitors general statistics for Contour Ingress Controller (Projectcontour) 

Based on https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/21402-contour-global-metrics

panels.description: This is the total number of requests made in this period (top-right period selected)
panels.title: Requests (period)

panels.description: The number of HTTP requests made in the last five minute window
panels.title: Reqs (5m)

panels.description: This is the total number of connections made in this period (top-right period selected)
panels.title: Conns (period)

panels.description: This is the number of new connections made to the ingress in the five minutes.
panels.title: Conns (5m)

panels.description: Displays the number of Requests per Second being performed against each Upstream.
panels.title: Upstream RPS

panels.description: Displays the number of Connections per Second being performed against each Upstream.
panels.title: Upstream CPS

panels.description: This is the total number of requests made in this period (top-right period selected)
panels.title: Requests (period)

panels.description: The number of HTTP requests made in the last five minute window
panels.title: Reqs (5m)

panels.description: This is the total number of connections made in this period (top-right period selected)
panels.title: Conns (period)

panels.description: This is the number of new connections made to the ingress in the five minutes.
panels.title: Conns (5m)
